name: Drata
description: Drata — continuous security & compliance automation (SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR…). Imports Drata policies + evidence/documents into the XORCISM controlled-document register (XCOMPLIANCE.DOCUMENT). Offline: a JSON export. Live: set DRATA_API_KEY (Bearer) and optionally DRATA_API_BASE (default https://public-api.drata.com). Tool: https://drata.com.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline JSON export of Drata policies/evidence.

parameters.name: base
parameters.help: Drata API base URL (default https://public-api.drata.com). Live mode needs DRATA_API_KEY in the worker env.
